steps.title: Trace the curing sequence
steps.content: The notes describe UV light images projected into liquid resin, layers forming as the object is raised and more resin flows, and final baking in an oven. The answer must keep that sequence and the roles of light, resin, and oven clear.

steps.title: Reject scrambled processes
steps.content: A suggests UV light itself is baked. B says DLS passes through a dead zone, though the light passes through and resin flows there. D suggests the resin solidifies and then passes through the dead zone. The accurate description has UV light curing resin layer by layer before oven curing. The answer is C.
